Name: NpcParam
Description: Determines the parameters for enemy characters.

Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Used to determine the action parameters to use for this enemy.

Fields.Name: Think ID
Fields.Description: The think parameters to use for this enemy.

Fields.Name: Name ID
Fields.Description: The name to display for this entity. Only appears on the health bar of c0000 characters.

Fields.Name: Turn Velocity
Fields.Description: The rotation speed of the enemy. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Simple Collision Height
Fields.Description: Vertical radius of hitbox used for character to character collision. Requires useRagdoll = false

Fields.Name: Simple Collision Radius
Fields.Description: Horizontal radius of hitbox used for character to character collision. Requires useRagdoll = false

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: The weight of the character.

Fields.Name: Collision Height Offset
Fields.Description: The vertical offset of the character's hitbox. Will cause them to float.

Fields.Name: HP
Fields.Description: The character's maximum hit points.

Fields.Name: MP
Fields.Description: The character's maximum mana points.

Fields.Name: Souls
Fields.Description: The amount of souls dropped on death by this character.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 1
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 2
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 3
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 4
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 5
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID: 6
Fields.Description: The ID of the item lot to use for item drops for this character's death.

Fields.Name: Humanity Lot ID
Fields.Description: The humanity item lot to use for humanity rewards upon this character's death.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 0
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 4
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 5
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 6
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 7
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: Game Clear
Fields.Description: The ID of a SpEffect that affect this character that only applies on NG+ and higher. Used to scale enemy stats for each NG+ journey.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Physical
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Physical damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Magic
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Magic damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Fire
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Fire damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Lightning
Fields.Description: The percentage reduction in Lightning damage taken when this character is guarding.

Fields.Name: Primary Animation ID Offset
Fields.Description: A value to offset animation IDs by. 0 = a00, 10000 = a01, etc.

Fields.Name: Move Animation ID
Fields.Description: The movement animation to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Special Movement Animation ID: 0
Fields.Description: The special movement animation to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Special Movement Animation ID: 1
Fields.Description: The special movement animation to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Network Warp Judgement Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which to warp this character instead of allowing standard movement during network synchronization.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: R1
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: L1
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: R2
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: L2
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Square
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Circle
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Cross
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Triangle
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Left Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Right Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Down Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Debug Action: Up Arrow
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use when the specified button is pressed during a debug session.

Fields.Name: Secondary Animation ID Offset
Fields.Description: A value to offset animation IDs by. 0 = a00, 10000 = a01, etc.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 1
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 2
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 3
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 4
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 5
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 6
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 7
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Part 8
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the mesh assigned as this part.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier: Weak Point
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to incoming damage against the weak point part.

Fields.Name: Poise Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The change to apply to poise recovery speed for this character.

Fields.Name: Poise Break Stagger Distance
Fields.Description: The knockback distance for the stagger when this character's poise is broken.

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: The maximum stamina for this character.. Used for non c0000 enemies blocking in DS1

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The recovery speed for stamina for this character.

Fields.Name: Defense: Physical
Fields.Description: The flat physical damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Defense: Slash
Fields.Description: This value is applied to the flat physical defense when the sub-type matches. For example: 10 = +10% defense, -10 = -10% defense

Fields.Name: Defense: Strike
Fields.Description: This value is applied to the flat physical defense when the sub-type matches. For example: 10 = +10% defense, -10 = -10% defense

Fields.Name: Defense: Thrust
Fields.Description: This value is applied to the flat physical defense when the sub-type matches. For example: 10 = +10% defense, -10 = -10% defense

Fields.Name: Defense: Magic
Fields.Description: The flat magic damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Defense: Fire
Fields.Description: The flat physical damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Defense: Lightning
Fields.Description: The flat physical damage defense this character possess.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Defense
Fields.Description: Innate deflection defense. Deflected attacks can have their damage reduced via flickDamageCutRate

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Poison
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Toxic
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Bleed
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Curse
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this character against the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Wandering Ghost: Model ID
Fields.Description: The model ID to use for the wandering ghost version of this character.

Fields.Name: Normal Change: Resource ID
Fields.Description: The resource ID to use for the normal texture.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Guard Angle
Fields.Description: Defense generation range angle when guarding (horizontal direction). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: The amount of poise this character has. Requires dmgLevel to be set to function properly.

Fields.Name: Normal Change: Texture ID
Fields.Description: The resource ID to use for the character texture.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Type
Fields.Description: Determines behavior and appearance of dropped items.

Fields.Name: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The rate of knockback suffered from sources of knockback from attackers.

Fields.Name: Knockback ID
Fields.Description: The parameters to use for knockback.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage %
Fields.Description: The dampening rate to apply to fall damage suffered.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Stamina
Fields.Description: The amount to reduce stamina damage by when received by the character.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (Black)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to Black World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (White)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to White World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (Left)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Player (Right)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the player) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (Black)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to Black World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (White)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to White World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (Left)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: World Tendency: Area (Right)
Fields.Description: The amount to add to World Tendency (for the area) when this character dies.

Fields.Name: MP Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: The speed at which mana points are restored for this character.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Absorption %
Fields.Description: A multiplier to apply to damage if the source has been deflected. 50 = -50% damage, 90 = -90% damage

Fields.Name: Default LOD Param ID
Fields.Description: The default LOD parameter to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Draw Type
Fields.Description: The draw type used for this character. Normally affects the shader used.

Fields.Name: Character Type
Fields.Description: The character type assigned to this character.

Fields.Name: Team Type
Fields.Description: The team type assigned to this character.

Fields.Name: Move Type
Fields.Description: The move type assigned to this character.

Fields.Name: Additional Lock-on Distance
Fields.Description: Additional maximum lock-on distance added onto base distance defined in LockCamParam

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound
Fields.Description: The sound used when guarding.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle
Fields.Description: The particles used when guarding.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The sound used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The particles used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Parts Damage Type
Fields.Description:
Determines if weak parts (such as the head) will be affected by all attacks or just arrow attacks.
Headshot animation will be used for weak part attacks if it exists.

Fields.Name: Maximum Angle for Undulation
Fields.Description: Maximum angle enemies can rotate vertically while on slopes. Requires isUnduration

Fields.Name: Guard Damage Level
Fields.Description: When guarding, the guard animation offset to use when being attacked.

Fields.Name: Burn Particle Type
Fields.Description: The particle type to use when burning.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Poison
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Toxic
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Bleed
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Curse
Fields.Description: The absorption to apply to damage of the specified type when guarding.

Fields.Name: Parry Attack
Fields.Description: The attack power value to use when calculating a parry as the parrying side.

Fields.Name: Parry Defense
Fields.Description: The defense power value to use when calculating a parry as the parried side.

Fields.Name: Particle Size
Fields.Description: The size of the particles used by this character.

Fields.Name: Camera Push-out Radius
Fields.Description: The collision radius for the character in which a camera is pushed away.

Fields.Name: Hit Stop Type
Fields.Description: Determines how enemy is affected by hitstop.

Fields.Name: Top of Ladder Offset
Fields.Description: The offset to apply when determining the top of a ladder (if this character is climbing). In 1/10 metres.

Fields.Name: Bottom of Ladder Offset
Fields.Description: The offset to apply when determining the top of a ladder (if this character is climbing). In 1/10 metres.

Fields.Name: Is Ragdoll Collision valid for Camera Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, then the character's ragdoll can collide with a camera.

Fields.Name: Disable Rigid Cloth Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, rigid cloth collision is ignored for this character.

Fields.Name: Use Ragdoll Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, then ragdoll is used for character to character collision. If false, hitRadius and hitHeight are used instead

Fields.Name: Is Demon
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with antiDemonDamageRate (anti-demon damage).

Fields.Name: Is Ghost
Fields.Description: If ON, character is treated as a ghost.

Fields.Name: Ignore Damage Motion for Dummy Hits
Fields.Description: If ON, damage level motion is ignored if the damage suffered is 0.

Fields.Name: Is Undulating
Fields.Description: If ON, enemies will rotate vertically on slopes. Rotation angle determines by maxUndurationAng

Fields.Name: Is Valid for Wandering Ghost
Fields.Description: If ON, character is valid for the wandering ghost feature.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 0
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 1
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 2
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 3
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 4
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 5
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 6
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 7
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 8
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 9
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 10
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 11
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 12
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 13
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 14
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Model Mask: 15
Fields.Description: Displays the model corresponding to the display mask.

Fields.Name: Enable Head Oscillation
Fields.Description: If ON, then the character's head will oscillate.

Fields.Name: Disable Bonfire Respawn
Fields.Description: If ON, the character will not reset position and behavior when the player rests at a bonfire.

Fields.Name: Is Move Animation Persistent
Fields.Description: If ON, movement animation will continue during other animations.

Fields.Name: Is Crowd Character
Fields.Description: If ON, this character is considered a crowd character and will use a reduced profile when multiple characters are present.

Fields.Name: Is Weak to Divine
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with antSaintDamageRate (holy damage).

Fields.Name: Is Weak to Occult
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with antWeakA_DamageRate (occult damage).

Fields.Name: Is Abyssal
Fields.Description: If ON, character will be affected by weapons with antWeakB_DamageRate (anti-darkwraith damage).

Fields.Name: Vow Type
Fields.Description: The pledge type used by this character.

Fields.Name: Reload Character on Initialisation
Fields.Description: If true, dead enemies will be alive again when the game is reset without respawning enemies (such as quitting to menu)
